## Summary

Describe the change and why it belongs in Thought API.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] API or behavior change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] Dependency or tooling
- [ ] Governance or contributor process

## Contributor checks

- [ ] I ran `npm ci`, or I am using dependencies installed from the current `package-lock.json`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run build`.
- [ ] I ran `npm test`.
- [ ] I reviewed `npm audit --audit-level=high` output, or explained why audit could not be run.

## Safety and data handling

- [ ] This PR does not add secrets, credentials, local databases, logs, uploads, production deployment config, or non-public datasets.
- [ ] This PR does not make points, markets, or agent participation look like financial, betting, wagering, or regulated decision infrastructure.
- [ ] Any security-sensitive finding is routed through `SECURITY.md` instead of public exploit details.

## Notes for reviewers

Call out migration risk, API compatibility risk, research-method assumptions, or follow-up work.
